emails.subject: A.Calo
emails.body: Diana, since I wasn't involved in her first raise, I really couldn't say what the nature of it was. You may be right that the 13th month is the complicating factor, but it should be a matter of record what her base salary is (that is what we are paying her). The raise should be applied to whatever her base salary is. If it is 72K, then it is 72K. We need to make sure, however, that we are not giving her an overlapping raise to the one ENA gave her. Mark, could you give me a call on Monday? We need to sort this out asap so that we can get her raise in place. Thanks, Randy Forwarded by Randy Young/ENRON_DEVELOPMENT on 02/06/2000 09:08 PM Diana Perez 02/05/2000 09:50 AM
